---
title: "Practicals"
---

# Practical Sessions

Hands-on notebooks and exercises for the course.

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-6}
## Pandas Basics

Introduction to tabular data manipulation with Pandas.

[Open Notebook](practical/00_pandas_basics.html){.btn .btn-success}
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
## Plot Basics

Basic scientific visualization techniques.

[Open Notebook](practical/00_plot_basisc.html){.btn .btn-success}
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
## DataFrames

Working with structured datasets and transformations.

[Open Notebook](practical/01_dataframes.html){.btn .btn-success}
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
## Xarray in 45 Minutes

Introduction to xarray for multidimensional labeled data.

[Open Notebook](practical/02_xarray_in_45_min.html){.btn .btn-success}
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
## Xarray + Flowmaps

Spatial mobility analysis with xarray and flowmaps.

[Open Notebook](practical/03_xarray_flowmaps.html){.btn .btn-success}
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
## Basic SIR Model

First epidemic simulation using SIR dynamics.

[Open Notebook](practical/04_0_SIR_basic.html){.btn .btn-success}
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
## Basic Example

Simple epidemic simulation example.

[Open Notebook](practical/04_1_basic_example.html){.btn .btn-success}
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
## Lattice Mobility

Spatial epidemic spreading on mobility lattices.

[Open Notebook](practical/04_2_lattice_mobility.html){.btn .btn-success}
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
## Quarantine Strategies

Modeling interventions and quarantine dynamics.

[Open Notebook](practical/04_3_quarantine.html){.btn .btn-success}
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
## Parallel Computing

Parallel execution examples and HPC workflows.

[Open Notebook](practical/05_parallel_computing.html){.btn .btn-success}
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
## Evolutionary Algorithms

Optimization using CMA-ES and evolutionary methods.

[Open Notebook](practical/06_evolutionary_algorithms.html){.btn .btn-success}
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
## Processing Zones

Utilities for processing spatial zones and datasets.

[Open Notebook](practical/process_zones.html){.btn .btn-success}
:::

:::
